attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
BK_CEC_ID, 
INITIALIZATION_VARIABLE_NAME, 
INITIALIZATION_VALUE_TXT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM 
(
SELECT   DD_CEC_ID BK_CEC_ID, CAST( 'ROLES' AS VARCHAR(20))  INITIALIZATION_VARIABLE_NAME ,  CAST( (CASE WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MBRAM_Super_User' THEN 'MBRAM_Super_User'    
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME= 'Sales Discount Guidance AM' THEN  'SDG AM' 
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME= 'Sales Discount Guidance RM' THEN  'SDG RM' 
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME= 'MBRSA Admin' THEN  'BIAdministrator'  
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME= 'MBR RM GSP' THEN  'MBR RM GSP'  
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MBR Daily Tracker' THEN 'MBR Daily Tracker' 
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='RM Order Search' THEN 'RM Order Search'
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MBR COMMITEMAIL' THEN 'MBR COMMITEMAIL'
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MBR COMMITCON' THEN 'MBR COMMITCON'
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MBR Recurring Offer' THEN 'MBR Recurring Offer'
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='Bookings 360 Pilot' THEN 'Bookings 360 Pilot'
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='Executive (Mobility)' THEN 'Executive (Mobility)'
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MSIS NG' THEN 'MSIS NG'
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MSIS NG DEF LDG' THEN 'MSIS NG DEF LDG'
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MBR HOURLY PILOT' THEN 'MBR HOURLY PILOT'
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='Profitability Biz Summary' THEN 'Profitability Biz Summary'
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MBR GROWTH METRICS' THEN 'MBR GROWTH METRICS'
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MBR BGM Visibility' THEN 'MBR BGM Visibility'
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='Bookings 360 CM' THEN 'Bookings 360 CM' 

WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MBR ACV Pilot - AM' THEN 'MBR ACV Pilot - AM' 
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MBR ACV Pilot - SM Comm' THEN 'MBR ACV Pilot - SM Comm' 
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MBR ACV Pilot - SM Ent' THEN 'MBR ACV Pilot - SM Ent' 
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MBR Voicebot Pilot' THEN 'MBR Voicebot Pilot' 
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='MBR SPIFF Admin' THEN 'MBR SPIFF Admin'
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='PSS Pilot' THEN 'PSS Pilot'
ELSE IAM_ROLE_NAME
END)  AS VARCHAR(100)) INITIALIZATION_VALUE_TXT
FROM 
(SELECT (CASE WHEN DD_CEC_ID IS NULL THEN NIU.RU_IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME ELSE DD_CEC_ID END) AS DD_CEC_ID ,
URAC.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  IAM_ROLE_NAME FROM  
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU,
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER_ROLE_APP_COMP_MAP URAC,
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT APPC,
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE  IR
WHERE 
URAC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG        = 'N' AND 
NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'  AND
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY = URAC.IAM_USER_KEY AND
URAC.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY            = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AND
URAC.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY = APPC.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY
AND IR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME = URAC.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME) Z
WHERE IAM_ROLE_NAME IN ('MBR BGM Visibility','MBR GROWTH METRICS', 'Sales Discount Guidance AM' , 'Sales Discount Guidance RM', 'MBRAM_Super_User' , 'MBRSA Admin' ,'MBR RM GSP','MBR Daily Tracker' ,'Bookings 360 CM','RM Order Search', 'MBR COMMITCON','MBR COMMITEMAIL','MBR Recurring Offer','Bookings 360 Pilot','Executive (Mobility)','MSIS NG','MSIS NG DEF LDG','MBR HOURLY PILOT','Profitability Biz Summary',
'MBR ACV Pilot - AM','MBR ACV Pilot - SM Comm','MBR ACV Pilot - SM Ent','MBR Voicebot Pilot','MBR SPIFF Admin','PSS Pilot')
UNION
SELECT   DD_CEC_ID BK_CEC_ID,  'ROLES'  INITIALIZATION_VARIABLE_NAME ,  CAST( (CASE 
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME= 'Bookings 360 TMS' THEN  'Bookings 360 TMS' 
WHEN IAM_ROLE_NAME='Bookings 360 BE' THEN 'Bookings 360 BE' END)  AS VARCHAR(100)) INITIALIZATION_VALUE_TXT
FROM 
(SELECT (CASE WHEN DD_CEC_ID IS NULL THEN NIU.RU_IAM_DUMMY_USER_NAME ELSE DD_CEC_ID END) AS DD_CEC_ID ,
URAC.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  IAM_ROLE_NAME FROM  
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU,
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER_ROLE_APP_COMP_MAP URAC,
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT APPC,
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE  IR
WHERE 
URAC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG        = 'N' AND 
NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'  AND
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY = URAC.IAM_USER_KEY AND
URAC.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY            = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AND
URAC.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY = APPC.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY
AND IR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME = URAC.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME) Z
WHERE IAM_ROLE_NAME IN (  'Bookings 360 TMS'  , 'Bookings 360 BE' ) 
AND DD_CEC_ID IN
(SELECT DD_CEC_ID FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK LNK, $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDT WHERE LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=PDT.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT            
AND APPLICATION_NAME='My Business Report Tool' and BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME = 'Bookings 360' and IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT<=3)
UNION
SELECT  DD_CEC_ID,  'ROLES'  , 
CASE     WHEN APPLICATION_NAME = 'My Business Report Tool' 
AND BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD = 'DR'                 AND       BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME <> 'Bookings 360' THEN 'MBR DR RM ROLE' 
WHEN    APPLICATION_NAME = 'My Business Report Tool' 
AND BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD = 'DR'               AND       BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME = 'Bookings 360' THEN 'Bookings 360' 
WHEN    APPLICATION_NAME = 'My Business Report Tool' 
AND BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD = 'IS'      AND       BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME <> 'Bookings 360'          THEN  'MBR IS RM ROLE' 
WHEN    APPLICATION_NAME = 'MBR AM' AND BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE 'DR_%'  THEN 'MBR DR AM ROLE' 
END       (NAMED ROLE_NAME ) 
FROM    $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK MBISTL, $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
WHERE APPLICATION_NAME IN ( 'My Business Report Tool' , 'MBR AM') 
AND       BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD IN ( 'DR' ,'IS')
AND       RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MBISTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y' 
AND ROLE_NAME IS NOT NULL
UNION
select   DD_CEC_ID,  'ROLES', 'OVERLAY' 
from      $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK MBISTL, $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
where   RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MBISTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'
and        BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME like 'OVL_%' 
and        APPLICATION_NAME = 'MBR Overlay' 
UNION
SELECT  DD_CEC_ID,  'ROLES'  ,
CASE WHEN    APPLICATION_NAME = 'MBR AM'  AND BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE 'DR_%'  AND IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT>=4 THEN 'MBR AM DETAIL' 
WHEN    APPLICATION_NAME = 'MBR AM'  AND BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE 'DR_%'  AND IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT<4 THEN 'MBR AM SUMMARY' 
END       (NAMED ROLE_NAME ) 
FROM    $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK MBISTL,$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
WHERE APPLICATION_NAME = 'MBR AM'
AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MBISTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'
UNION
SELECT DD_CEC_ID, 'ROLES', 'MBR AM SL'
FROM    $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK MBISTL,$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
WHERE APPLICATION_NAME = 'MBR AM'
AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MBISTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'
AND   DV_AM_EXPLOSION_VIEW_FLG='N' 
UNION
SELECT DD_CEC_ID,  'ROLES', 'MBR AM ML'
FROM    $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK MBISTL,$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
WHERE APPLICATION_NAME = 'MBR AM'
AND  RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MBISTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'
AND   DV_AM_EXPLOSION_VIEW_FLG='Y'
UNION
SELECT DD_CEC_ID,  'ROLES', 'NO DISTI ROLE' ROLE_NAME
from $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK  LNK1,$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
WHERE APPLICATION_NAME IN ('My Business Report Tool')
AND BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD='DR'
AND IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT=0
AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = LNK1.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK  LNK2
WHERE
LNK2.APPLICATION_NAME=LNK1.APPLICATION_NAME AND
LNK2.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD=LNK1.BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD AND
LNK2.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT=LNK1.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT AND
LNK2.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=LNK1.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND LNK2.DD_CEC_ID=LNK1.DD_CEC_ID
AND BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  IN ('IT MBR','GSTS-MBR-SUPPORT'))

UNION
SELECT  DD_CEC_ID,  'ROLES'  , 'RM DR L' || COALESCE( TRIM ( MINIMUM ( IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT ) ) ,
'-NoAsgn' ) 
FROM    $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK LNK, $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
WHERE APPLICATION_NAME = 'My Business Report Tool' 
AND       BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME <> 'Bookings 360' 
AND       BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD = 'DR' 
AND       RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND       RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'
GROUP BY DD_CEC_ID
UNION
SELECT  DD_CEC_ID,  'ROLES'  , 'RM IS L' || COALESCE( TRIM ( MINIMUM ( IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT ) ) ,
'-NoAsgn' ) 
FROM    $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK LNK, $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
WHERE APPLICATION_NAME = 'My Business Report Tool' 
AND       BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD = 'IS' 
AND       BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME <> 'Bookings 360' 
AND       RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND       RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'
GROUP BY DD_CEC_ID
UNION

SELECT                 DD_CEC_ID,  'ROLES'  (NAMED ROLES ) , 'MULTILEVELO' (NAMED ROLENAME ) 
FROM    $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK LNK, $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
WHERE  RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND       RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'
AND       BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE 'OVL_%' 
AND       APPLICATION_NAME = 'MBR Overlay' 
GROUP BY DD_CEC_ID
HAVING               count(distinct iam_level_num_int) > 1
UNION
SELECT            DD_CEC_ID,  'ROLES'  (NAMED ROLES ) , 'MULTILEVELD' (NAMED ROLENAME ) 
FROM    $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK LNK, $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
WHERE RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND       RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'
AND       BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME LIKE 'DR_%' 
AND       APPLICATION_NAME = 'MBR AM' 
GROUP BY DD_CEC_ID
HAVING                count(distinct iam_level_num_int) > 1   
UNION
SELECT  DD_CEC_ID,  'ROLES'  , 'BL' || COALESCE( TRIM ( MINIMUM ( IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT ) ) ,
'-NoAsgn' ) 
FROM    $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK LNK, $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY 
WHERE RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND       RFMY.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'
AND       BK_SALES_TERR_ASSGNMNT_TYPE_CD = 'DR' 
AND       BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME = 'Bookings 360' 
AND       APPLICATION_NAME = 'My Business Report Tool'
GROUP BY DD_CEC_ID
UNION 
SELECT DD_CEC_ID AS BK_CEC_ID, 'Mobility App Role' as INITIALIZATION_VARIABLE_NAME, 
MAX(CASE WHEN APPLICATION_NAME='My Business Report Tool' THEN 'MBR RM' ELSE 'MBR AM' END ) AS INITIALIZATION_VARIABLE_TXT
FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK LNK, $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE
WHERE LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT    
AND LNK.APPLICATION_NAME IN ('My Business Report Tool','MBR AM')
AND LNK.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME <> 'Bookings 360' 
GROUP BY DD_CEC_ID
UNION 
SELECT 
DD_CEC_ID AS BK_CEC_ID, 'Mobility FMV Role' as INITIALIZATION_VARIABLE_NAME, 
CASE WHEN MIN(IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT  )<3 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END INITIALIZATION_VARIABLE_TXT
FROM  $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK LNK, $$ETLVWDB.MBR_PROCESS_DATE PDATE
WHERE LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND LNK.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME <> 'Bookings 360' 
AND LNK.APPLICATION_NAME IN ('My Business Report Tool','MBR AM')
AND LNK.APPLICATION_NAME=
(  
SELECT MAX(APPLICATION_NAME) 
FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_BUSMBR_IAM_SALES_TERR_LINK LNK1
WHERE  LNK1.APPLICATION_NAME IN ('My Business Report Tool','MBR AM')
AND LNK1.DD_CEC_ID=LNK.DD_CEC_ID
AND LNK1.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME <> 'Bookings 360' 
AND LNK1.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=LNK.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
)
GROUP BY LNK.DD_CEC_ID
) ROLES
WHERE BK_CEC_ID IS NOT NULL OR BK_CEC_ID<>'  -999'
